mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(politics), 1) AS avgPolitics, MAX(politics) AS maxPolitics, MIN(politics) AS minPolitics, ROUND(AVG(foreign_lang), 1) AS avgForeign, MAX(foreign_lang) AS maxForeign, MIN(foreign_lang) AS minForeign, ROUND(AVG(major_basis), 1) AS avgMajorBasis, MAX(major_basis) AS maxMajorBasis, MIN(major_basis) AS minMajorBasis FROM first_test_score

SELECT '政治' AS subject, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN politics >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS passRate, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN politics < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS failRate FROM first_test_score UNION ALL SELECT '外语' AS subject, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN foreign_lang >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS passRate, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN foreign_lang < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS failRate FROM first_test_score UNION ALL SELECT '专业基础' AS subject, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN major_basis >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS passRate, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN major_basis < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS failRate FROM first_test_score

SELECT CASE WHEN total_first < 200 THEN '200分以下' WHEN total_first BETWEEN 200 AND 249 THEN '200-249分' WHEN total_first BETWEEN 250 AND 299 THEN '250-299分' ELSE '300分以上' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(*) AS count FROM first_test_score GROUP BY scoreRange ORDER BY MIN(total_first)

SELECT CASE WHEN total_second < 200 THEN '200分以下' WHEN total_second BETWEEN 200 AND 230 THEN '200-230分' WHEN total_second BETWEEN 231 AND 260 THEN '231-260分' ELSE '260分以上' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(*) AS count FROM second_test_score GROUP BY scoreRange ORDER BY MIN(total_second)
